rulings.Case Title: NELLIE BERTUCCI ET AL VS. ANGELIQUE TAVARES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Documents And Testimony Of Richard Grabstein And The Appointment Of A Discovery Referee
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 14, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT ANGELIQUE TAVARES's Motion To Compel Documents And Testimony Of Richard Grabstein And The Appointment Of A Discovery Referee GRANTED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NELLIE BERTUCCI ET AL VS. ANGELIQUE TAVARES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 14, 2017 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT ROBERT BERTUCCI DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT Hearing Required to address case management issues, including but not limited to whether Ms. Bertucci should be represented by a separate attorney and whether the case should be bifurcated so that the issue of Ms. Bertucci's capacity (and validity of the First and Second Amendments) be adjudicated before the rest of the case proceeds. Parties are to meet and confer prior to the hearing and agree on the deadlines and the procedures to properly bring these matters before the Court in a timely fashion.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NELLIE BERTUCCI ET AL VS. ANGELIQUE TAVARES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For A Protective Order (Wel. And Inst. Code Section 15657.03)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 14, 2017 line 3. PLAINTIFFs NELLIE BERTUCCI and ROBERT BERTUCCI's Motion For A Protective Order (Wel. And Inst. Code Section 15657.03) Parties are ordered to meet and confer and agree on setting up an escrow account into which to deposit the funds previously held in the brokerage account. The Court will issue an order directing the current title holder of the real property not to transfer the ownership of the property and not to encumber it in any way until this matter is resolved. Moving party to prepare an order in conformity with this tentative ruling. = (501/REQ)
